ticket.description:
Hello,

We would like the customer's Tax ID (VAT number or Tax Number) stored in their Shopify customer profile to be automatically transferred to the "TAX ID" (or "TAX No") field in shipping address and billing address in PH Multi Carrier.

When shipping orders to professional/business customers, this Tax ID must be included in both the shipping and billing addresses to ensure smooth customs clearance.

Currently, the TAX ID field in PH Multi Carrier is always empty, even when the information is registered in Shopify. As a result, our team has to manually enter the Tax ID for every shipment, which is time-consuming and increases the risk of errors.

Could you please let us know if this automatic synchronization can be enabled or implemented?

Thank you for your support.

Kind regards,
Wako

------------------
Submitted from: https://mcsl-s.pluginhive.io/home/views/orders/summary/c009fe83-7893-4245-b422-1147f2a44bed/74cb4170-4b0d-4b29-92d1-5e60e8f012fd/new

Could you please let us know if this automatic synchronization can be enabled or implemented?

Thank you for your support.

Kind regards,
Wako

 Could you please let us know if this automatic synchronization can be enabled or implemented?

comments.body:
Hello Wako,

Thank you for reaching out with your query.

To assist with your case further, could you please share an order number in Shopify where the recipient TaxID is available and also share a screenshot of where the TaxID is available in the Shopify Order?
We will check the feasibility of your requirements.

Please note that the app syncs the Order details from the Shopify Orders page and does not sync any details from the Customer Profiles. If the TaxID is available in the Shopify order, we will be happy to check the feasibility of your requirement.

Awaiting your response.

Thanks and Regards,
Touseef
Team PluginHive
comments.html_body:
Hello Wako,
 
Thank you for reaching out with your query.
 
To assist with your case further, could you please share an order number in Shopify where the recipient TaxID is available and also share a screenshot of where the TaxID is available in the Shopify Order?
We will check the feasibility of your requirements.
 
Please note that the app syncs the Order details from the Shopify Orders page and does not sync any details from the Customer Profiles. If the TaxID is available in the Shopify order, we will be happy to check the feasibility of your requirement.
 
Awaiting your response.
 
Thanks and Regards,
Touseef
Team PluginHive

comments.body:
Hello Touseef,



Thank you for your response.

I understand that you synchronize only from Shopify orders, not from customer profiles.



We save the customer's Tax ID in the "Notes" section in the customers profile, which appears in the "View notes" section of the Shopify order.

Please see the screen recording in the attachment.



If you can transfer this "Note" section to "TAX NO" column in the shipping & billing address on PH mutil carrier app, that would be great.



Kind regards,
Wako Chapurlat
MAJO GARN

email wako@majogarn.com

Web www.majogarn.com

Thank you for your response and sharing the details.

We will be forwarding your requirement to our team for further feasibility testing. Before that, could you also share a screen recording with the process of how the Note is added to the Customer details to Order in Shopify?

This will give us a better understanding of the process and check the feasibility of your requirement.

Awaiting your response.

Thanks and Regards,

comments.body:
Hello Touseef,

I believe the customer details in the profile are automatically transferred to the Notes section of the order by Shopify. We do not perform any manual actions, nor do we have a specific app setting to automate this transfer.

The primary goal remains to have the customer's tax number automatically appear in the Shipping Address and Billing Address columns within the PH Multi Carrier app.

I hope this clarifies the process.

We would really appreciate it if customer's tax number automatically appears in the shipping address & billing address columns.


Kind regards,
Wako Chapurlat
MAJO GARN

email wako@majogarn.com

Web www.majogarn.com

comments.body:
L3: https://pluginhive.slack.com/archives/C02E15X8X0C/p1780333182220009

France Merchant using MCSL-S with FedEx and UPS for rates and labels. He is on Popular Plan.
Merchant has shared a requirement and I wanted input from team if it would be feasible.
Merchant received B2B orders as well on his store and in most cases, the Customer Profile in Shopify will contain recipient Tax IDs.
This Tax ID is reflected in the Customer specific Shopify Order as Note under the Customer section.
Merchant wants the app to automatically use this Tax ID as the recipient tax id for the order and show it on the Invoice generated. As of now, he is manually updating the detail in the app for each applicable order.
Merchant has also shared a screen recording of the same which I have attached here for reference. We also have collaborator access for the store to check the orders.
Merchant has also confirmed that the Tax ID details in Shopify Order are updated automatically and he is not using any app for this or doing it manually.
Could you please review the requirement and let us know if this would be feasible?

URL - majo-garn.myshopify.com
Account ID - 32f69ae8-db0f-407e-973c-e4e64cefdcee

comments.body:
Hello Wako,

Thank you for your patience.

Our team has checked your requirements and it will be considered it for app enhancement.

As of now, we do not have an exact ETA to share with you.

However, once a timeline is available for the enhancement, we will reach out and update you of the same.

Feel free to reach out if you have any further queries in the meantime.

Thanks and Regards,
Touseef
Team PluginHive
